caption: The video features a speaker at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, dressed in a dark suit and light blue shirt, is engaged in delivering a presentation or interview. He appears to be explaining a concept or sharing insights, using hand gestures for emphasis. The background shows a professional setting with other attendees and staff members, some of whom are seated and others standing. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay on the screen. The atmosphere suggests a formal yet interactive environment typical of tech conferences.
